headline: Cencora Announces Date and Time for Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release
summary: CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., July 01, 2026--Cencora, Inc. (NYSE: COR) today announced that it plans to release its results for the Third Quarter of Fiscal 2026 on Wednesday, August 5, 2026, prior to the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The Company will host a conference call to discuss the results at 8:30 a.m. ET on August 5, 2026.
